headline: Price Prediction: Synopsys’ Chip-Design Moat and The Path to 24% Upside
summary: Synopsys (NASDAQ:SNPS) sits at the center of every advanced chip designed today, and the math behind our model says the market is underpricing that moat. With shares trading at $454.34, our 24/7 Wall St. price target for Synopsys is $561.65, implying 23.62% upside over the next twelve months. The recommendation is buy at a 90% ... Price Prediction: Synopsys’ Chip-Design Moat and The Path to 24% Upside
